chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1348 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.12.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The conduct displayed by the petitioner prima facie indicates that he is no more interested in the matter. Accordingly captioned petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
